name: bears-app-based-workflow
description: Bears app workflow plugin for waves, functional graphs, task ledgers, deliverable-based role selection, and delegated L3 execution.

interface.shortDescription: Wave-based app workflow with plugin-selected L3 roles.
interface.longDescription: Bears App-Based Workflow provides app constitutions, research waves, functional specifications, graph-linked plans, deliverable-based L3 execution, instruction policy editing, role profile architecture, primary-source evidence research, and convergence analysis.
defaultPrompt: Execute ready ledger work with selected L3 roles.
